name: Tupalo
title_tag: Manage Your Business Information on Tupalo with Synup
tags: india; france; netherlands; nigeria; ireland; australia; new-zealand; canada; united-states-us
detailed_paragraph:
Tupalo + Synup

Add, claim, edit business listings & reviews on Tupalo with Synup's listings & review management tools.

What is Tupalo?

Tupalo is an online platform that offers business listings and information for various local businesses and services. It assists users in discovering and connecting with businesses in their vicinity, providing a convenient resource for those seeking local recommendations and services.

Why Tupalo + Synup?

  • Complete Control Over Listings: With the ability to manage your business listings on Tupalo, you maintain full control over your online presence, ensuring your business is represented accurately.
  • Broaden Your Reach: Adding your business to Tupalo through Synup means increased visibility. Help potential customers discover you, effectively expanding your reach.
  • Accurate Business Information: Enhance trust and credibility by publishing accurate information on Tupalo.
  • Customer Engagement: View and respond back to reviews on Tupalo, fostering a positive relationship with your customers, showing that you value their feedback and are attentive to their needs.

How to integrate Tupalo + Synup?

The Tupalo integration is available to all Synup listings plan subscribers. To view & manage the Tupalo integration:

  1. Visit the Listings tab on Synup's console.
  2. Navigate to the Premium Listings section.
  3. Click on the Tupalo logo to manage the Synup + Tupalo integration and associated settings.
